{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324004311D04862B4E466FCA4F710"}"},"total":2340},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7108380366708540192","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书正好戳在我的心上，有江湖刀剑争霸，也有战场步骑厮杀，还有朝堂阴阳交锋，間杂着文学诗词，很喜欢的风格，给作者点赞👍🏻"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1655048920,"group_id":"7003760623775386657","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3R2+eum2EeHvae+dwPsdfA=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776873648&x-signature=PE4Lf3CdmV2eVKh7syh5Tz4y2hU%3D","user_id":"598610680749719","user_name":"爱吃银耳虾仁的崔颢"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"598610680749719","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7003760623775386657","book_info":{"abstract":"【全架空仙侠历史:权谋+仙侠+无系统。】
“启禀皇上，九世子连破四关，已经率军渡过饮马水河，直逼天门关。”众臣哑言
那个成天花天酒地，行军都带着舞姬的纨绔世子怎么可能连破四关，看这架势还要攻这西蜀第一雄关？
以西征为序幕，拉开一场百年朝堂的明争暗斗与一甲子江湖的风起云涌。
有人经书一卷，青灯长明，谋一个天下太平。
有人烈酒一碗，风雨无惧，求一个快意人生。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/5014570e1bab6cff2d08da5af6471f60","author":"朝辞故旧","author_id":"","book_id":"7003760623775386657","book_name":"一剑安天下","book_short_name":"风流少年游","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8c0c0","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.1万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1140,"name":"东方仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1140&name=东方仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":259,"name":"奇幻仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=259&name=奇幻仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":9,"name":"仙侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=9&name=仙侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":511,"name":"东方玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=511&name=东方玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7003770183479198211","read_count":"20597","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1209007"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.1","serial_count":"556","tags":"东方仙侠,奇幻仙侠,仙侠,玄幻,穿越,架空,东方玄幻,魂穿","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7014b371a28013b92396673c59235d71~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779468191&x-signature=P6Lf4x0eq6A0p6FeLfHzHxbJue8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1987532131931485","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"7.325
